title: Plutarch, Moralia: How to Tell a Friend from a Flatterer
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: How to Tell a Friend from a Flatterer.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: How to Tell a Friend from a Flatterer.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'How to Tell a Friend from a Flatterer': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
